blockingIssues.description: The required full-suite validator `pnpm -C "/Users/aischool/work/papierklammer_droid" test:run -- --maxWorkers=1` proved unstable across repeated reruns without repo code changes. One rerun passed, but later reruns failed with `PostgresError: deadlock detected` in `server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-local-auth.test.ts` and `server/src/__tests__/heartbeat-direct-wakeup-lease.test.ts`, and another rerun failed `server/src/__tests__/private-hostname-guard.test.ts` with `expected 200 to be 403`, so the lifecycle scrutiny gate cannot currently claim a clean validator pass.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission-directory scrutiny guidance still does not explain how reviewers should treat mission artifacts as the source of truth when the handoff commit only exposes incidental repo-side files.
`audit-worker` still marks procedure compliance without a visible `package.json` read in transcript skeletons, so the skill or review standard remains ambiguous.

override.justification: Lifecycle scrutiny review work passed, but repeated full-suite reruns remained unstable because of unrelated pre-existing validator noise (heartbeat-local-auth deadlock, heartbeat-direct-wakeup-lease deadlock, and private-hostname-guard order dependence). The QA-only mission should continue so user-testing and final reporting can capture product bugs rather than block on repo-global suite instability.
